portfolio.title: CropPortfolio
portfolio.description: Information about a specific crop in active portfolio including growth logging and pathology scans.

id.description: Unique identifier of the crop portfolio

name.description: Human-readable name of the crop portfolio

lastScan.description: ISO timestamp or text representing the last pathology scan date

status.description: Current status of the crop (e.g., Healthy, Warning, infected)

image.description: URL or image source for the crop portfolio illustration or photograph

healthScore.description: Current computed health score from 0 to 100

moisture.description: Current soil moisture levels as percentage

growthStage.description: The current crop vegetative or physiological phase

ownerId.description: Google Auth UID of the owner user

portfolios/{portfolioId}.description: User specific crop portfolios stored securely by user ID
